name: Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup finely crushed graham cracker crumbs
1 package chocolate pudding and pie filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine graham cracker crumbs, sugar and melted butter. Press mixture into the bottom and sides of a greased 9-inch springform pan.
2. In a saucepan, combine pudding mix, sugar and milk. Add chocolate. Cook over medium heat until the mixture comes to a full boil, stirring occasionally.
3. Remove from heat and cover surface with waxed paper. Set aside.
4. Beat cream cheese until fluffy. Beat in yolks, vanilla, salt and pudding mixture. Fold in egg whites (beat egg whites first).
5. Pour batter over crumbs in pan.
6. Bake on the lowest rack of the oven at 425°F for about 35 minutes or until the center is set lightly when touched.
7. Cool for 4 hours.
8. Spread sour cream over top.
